case_title: APEX REFRIGERATION VS. 242 COLUMBUS AVENUE LLC DBA TOSCA CAFE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-23-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-23-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF APEX REFRIGERATION IS PRESENT MS. JEANETTE BARGER, OWNER. DEFENDANT 242 COLUMBUS AVENUE LLC DBA TOSCA CAFE IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APEX REFRIGERATION DBA PELCO SALES & SERVICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT 242 COLUMBUS AVENUE LLC DBA TOSCA CAFE $4,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,910.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
